truthAudit.Summary: Audited Run 2 against ground truth. 8 of 20 true vulnerabilities were correctly identified with exact code quotes. 12 true vulnerabilities were missed. 2 previous findings were false positives not supported by the ground truth. Several severity ratings were corrected to match ground truth.

Items.Notes: Previous answer correctly identified format string injection in log_debug_message with exact code quote.
Integer overflow in factorial computation was not identified in the previous answer.
Use-after-free in memory pool cleanup was not identified.

Items.Key: command injection in admin console|os command injection|cwe-78|critical|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|605|608|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|std::string cmd = command.substr(5); system(cmd.c_str());|authenticated users can execute arbitrary os commands, leading to full system compromise.|sending an admin command starting with 'exec' followed by a shell payload (e.g., 'exec rm -rf /').|avoid system() entirely. use a whitelist of allowed commands or std::filesystem/std::process with strict input validation.->command injection in admin console|os command injection|cwe-78|critical|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|605|608|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|std::string cmd = command.substr(5); system(cmd.c_str());|authenticated users can execute arbitrary os commands, leading to full system compromise.|sending an admin command starting with 'exec' followed by a shell payload (e.g., 'exec rm -rf /').|avoid system() entirely. use a whitelist of allowed commands or std::filesystem/std::process with strict input validation.

intentional buffer overflow in evaluate_expression|buffer overflow|cwe-120|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|831|832|calculator::supercalc::evaluate_expression|if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); }|the condition explicitly triggers an unbounded strcpy when input exceeds buffer size, guaranteeing heap corruption.|entering an expression longer than 1024 characters.|remove the flawed condition. use safe_string_copy or std::string for all buffer operations.->intentional buffer overflow in evaluate_expression|buffer overflow|cwe-120|critical|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|831|832|calculator::supercalc::evaluate_expression|if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); }|the condition explicitly triggers an unbounded strcpy when input exceeds buffer size, guaranteeing heap corruption.|entering an expression longer than 1024 characters.|remove the flawed condition. use safe_string_copy or std::string for all buffer operations.
